subtopics: Conservation of charge, Coulomb's law, superposition principle, continuous charge distribution

subtopics: Electric potential, equipotential surfaces, electrical potential energy

subtopics: Drift velocity, mobility, Ohm's law and V-I characteristics

subtopics: Bar magnet as solenoid, Magnetic dipole field (axis/perpendicular)

subtopics: Peak and RMS values, Reactance and impedance

Displacement current, Transverse nature of EM waves, Electromagnetic spectrum and uses

subtopics: Reflection, Spherical mirrors (formula), Refraction at surfaces

subtopics: Huygen's principle, Reflection and refraction proofs
